name: Dumbbell Alternating Shoulder Press
shortDescription: A shoulder press using dumbbells, pressing one arm at a time to target the deltoids and stabilizers.
instructions: Sit or stand with a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height. Press one dumbbell overhead while keeping the other stationary, then alternate arms for each repetition.
steps: Hold dumbbells at shoulder level, palms facing forward.
Brace your core and press one dumbbell overhead until arm is fully extended.
Lower to shoulder height as you press the opposite dumbbell overhead.
Continue alternating arms with each rep.
Maintain upright posture and avoid arching back.
breathing: Exhale pressing up, inhale lowering down.
